text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I walk around the shopping district, I spot
Mejiro McQueen in front of a fishmonger's stall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All of this fish... So this is what a real fishmonger
is like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And enshrined at the very center, a sea
pineapple! It does look rather shocking...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It spoke!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Trainer! Please don't startle me like
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I came to explore the market a little bit. I never
had the opportunity to come as a child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And, well... I heard there was something here
called a sea pineapple...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They're low in fat and packed with nutrients.
Perfect for my die—I mean, they're quite healthy
so I was interested to give one a try.
choice_data_list: It certainly looks unusual... Think you can eat it?
It certainly looks unusual... Think you can eat it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, I admit my confidence is waning... I didn't
realize how... mushy it would be.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I don't know that it would agree with my
stomach... But if it's for my d—for my health...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? Should I brace myself like I'm
about to run down the slopes of Yodo and eat it?
choice_data_list: Let's take a look at something else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're right... I'm sure there are plenty of other
wonderful things here apart from sea pineapples.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
What's that one with the sharp, painful-looking
spikes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A sea urchin... I didn't realize their exterior was
like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What about this? It has... thirteen legs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a crisis averted, Mejiro McQueen acquires
valuable knowledge about all kinds of sea
creatures.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: D-dare I?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, you're right. No matter how strange this food
may seem, faltering here would make me a
laughingstock for the rest of my life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I won't bring shame upon the great Mejiro name!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now, let's give it a taste!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hm? It doesn't taste quite as horrifying as it
looks. There's a subtle delicacy to it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel empowered! Not to mention, it's good for
my diet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You've helped me discover something new about
myself. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. Why don't you take this opportunity
to try it for yourself? Come now, there's nothing
to be afraid of.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen urges me to try the strange
delicacy with a boastful look. It seems even sea
pineapples are no match for a Mejiro.
